with:
  # Track which objects from main subject are other entities
      referenced_entities = set()
  
      # First pass: collect all information by entity
      entity_triples = {}
      for t in triples:
          # Clean object values to remove unnecessary quotes
          t_clean = Triple(t.subject, t.predicate, clean_object(t.object))
          if t_clean.subject not in entity_triples:
              entity_triples[t_clean.subject] = []
          entity_triples[t_clean.subject].append(t_clean)
      triples = [Triple(t.subject, t.predicate, clean_object(t.object)) for t in triples]
